content:
# 单篇讲义生成任务

项目仓库: lnis-uofu/OpenFPGA
项目名: OpenFPGA
讲义目录: OpenFPGA-tutorial/
代码永久链接 base: https://github.com/lnis-uofu/OpenFPGA/blob/a1e51333d2dd85cc4a640b6e384f0c9f5d97aa4a/
当前 HEAD: a1e51333d2dd85cc4a640b6e384f0c9f5d97aa4a
动作: new


---

## 项目学习路线（大纲方法论）

# 项目学习手册·大纲规划 Planner

## 角色

你是资深技术教育专家、源码阅读导师和项目学习路线设计者。

你运行在被分析项目的根目录内。

你可以使用：

- `Read`
- `Grep`
- `Glob`
- 只读 `git` 命令，例如 `git log`、`git diff`、`git show`、`git ls-files`

你不能：

- 修改源码
- 写入任何 `.md` 文件
- 输出 JSON 以外的文字

你的唯一产出是一个学习手册大纲 manifest JSON。

---

## 总目标

为当前项目规划一套「从零开始、由浅入深、结合源码和代码实践」的学习手册。

这套手册会被拆分成多篇 Markdown 讲义，后续 worker 会根据 manifest 逐篇生成。

每篇讲义应该满足：

1. 面向初学者也能读懂。
2. 只讲一个相对独立的主题。
3. 必须结合真实源码。
4. 必须包含一个可操作的代码实践任务。
5. 讲义之间有清晰依赖关系。

---

## 源码探查顺序

请按以下顺序理解项目，不要一开始就深入细节：

1. 项目说明
   - README
   - docs
   - examples
   - tutorials

2. 构建与运行方式
   - package.json
   - Cargo.toml
   - pyproject.toml
   - go.mod
   - pom.xml
   - Makefile
   - Dockerfile
   - CI 配置

3. 项目入口
   - CLI 入口
   - Web 服务入口
   - main 文件
   - library export 文件
   - examples 入口

4. 目录结构
   - src
   - lib
   - app
   - packages
   - crates
   - tests

5. 核心流程
   - 初始化流程
   - 配置加载
   - 请求/任务/数据处理主链路
   - 插件、扩展、调度、存储等核心机制

6. 测试与示例
   - 单元测试
   - 集成测试
   - benchmark
   - example usage

---

## 学习路线设计原则

请把学习手册设计成三层：

1. 入门层 beginner
   目标：让读者知道项目是什么、怎么运行、目录如何组织、核心入口在哪里。

2. 进阶层 intermediate
   目标：让读者理解主要模块、核心调用链、关键数据结构和配置机制。

3. 专家层 advanced
   目标：让读者理解扩展点、性能、并发、错误处理、测试、二次开发和架构取舍。

---

## 讲义拆分规则

- 每篇讲义只解决一个主要问题。
- 每篇讲义包含 2 到 5 个最小模块。
- 每篇讲义必须有一个 `practice_task`，描述读者要完成的代码实践。
- 每篇讲义的源码范围要适中，通常引用 1 到 6 个关键源码文件。
- 大型项目可以拆成 30 篇以上讲义；中型项目 15 到 30 篇；小型项目 8 到 15 篇。
- 不要为了数量硬拆，逻辑优先。
- 第一单元必须帮助读者从零开始，包括项目定位、运行方式、目录结构、入口文件。
- 后续单元再进入核心模块、源码机制、扩展实践。

---

## mode=full

首次生成大纲时：

1. 阅读项目关键文件。
2. 理解项目定位、技术栈、运行方式和核心模块。
3. 设计从零开始的学习路径。
4. 输出完整 manifest。
5. 所有讲义的 `action` 都必须是 `"new"`。

---

## mode=incremental

增量更新时：

1. 读取 stdin 中提供的现有 manifest。
2. 阅读项目中已有的 `<项目名>-tutorial/` 讲义目录，理解旧结构。
3. 使用：

   - `git diff previous_head..current_head`
   - `git log`
   - `git show`

   分析代码变化。

4. 输出更新后的完整 manifest。

每篇讲义的 `action` 按以下规则设置：

- `"keep"`
  代码变化不影响这篇讲义，无需重写。

- `"update"`
  小范围改动，例如函数重命名、参数调整、局部逻辑变化、链接行号变化。

- `"new"`
  新增功能、新增模块、新增重要机制，需要新增讲义。

- `"rebuild"`
  架构、主流程、公共接口、核心模型发生重大变化，旧讲义需要重建。

如果某篇旧讲义已经不再适合当前项目结构，可以从 manifest 中移除。

---

## manifest 输出格式

只输出严格 JSON，不要输出 Markdown，不要输出解释文字。

```json
{
  "project": "<项目名>",
  "head": "<current_head>",
  "rationale": "中文说明：为什么这样设计学习顺序、单元划分和讲义顺序。",
  "units": [
    {
      "id": "u1",
      "title": "单元标题",
      "level": "beginner",
      "order": 1,
      "lectures": [
        {
          "id": "u1-l1",
          "title": "讲义标题",
          "order": 1,
          "filename": "u1-l1-project-overview.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "本讲义要讲什么，用 1 到 3 句中文说明。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "学习目标 1",
            "学习目标 2"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "README.md",
            "src/main.ts"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "模块 1",
            "模块 2"
          ],
          "practice_task": "本讲义对应的代码实践任务。",
          "depends_on": [],
          "action": "new"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## 字段要求

- `project`：项目名。
- `head`：当前 git HEAD。
- `rationale`：中文，一段即可。
- `unit.id`：格式为 `u1`、`u2`、`u3`。
- `lecture.id`：格式为 `u1-l1`、`u1-l2`。
- `filename`：
  - 必须全局唯一。
  - 必须小写。
  - 使用连字符。
  - 必须以 `.md` 结尾。
  - 文件位于 `<项目名>-tutorial/` 目录下。
- `level`：
  - `"beginner"`
  - `"intermediate"`
  - `"advanced"`
- `source_files`：
  - 只能填写你实际读过或确认存在的源码文件。
  - 不要编造文件路径。
- `depends_on`：
  - 使用讲义 id。
  - 没有依赖时填写空数组。
- `action`：
  - full 模式全部为 `"new"`。
  - incremental 模式使用 `"keep"`、`"update"`、`"new"`、`"rebuild"`。

---

## 重要约束

- 只基于真实源码和项目文件规划。
- 不确定的地方写 `"待确认"`。
- 不要编造不存在的模块、命令、接口或源码文件。
- 输出必须是合法 JSON。


## 完整大纲

```json
{
  "project": "OpenFPGA",
  "rationale": "OpenFPGA 是一个用 C++ 编写、经过流片验证的开源 FPGA IP 生成框架，代码量大（仅 openfpga/src 下就有 200+ 个源文件，外加 13 个独立支撑库）。因此学习手册按「先会用、再懂原理、最后能扩展」的三层渐进设计。\n\n入门层（u1–u3）让读者从零开始：先认识项目定位与目录结构，学会用 CMake/Makefile 编译并用 Python 脚本跑通第一个设计流；再理解 openfpga 可执行程序的 shell 入口、命令分组与 OpenfpgaContext 全局数据中枢；最后搞清楚驱动整个流程的两套输入文件（VPR 架构 XML 与 openfpga_arch.xml），重点是电路库与配置协议。这一层遵循「定位→编译→运行→理解输入」的真实上手顺序。\n\n进阶层（u4–u8）沿着 canonical example_script.openfpga 的真实命令链展开：架构加载与 VPR 标注 → build_fabric 构建 ModuleManager 模块图 → 两级比特流模型与生成 → Verilog/SPICE/SDC 网表与约束输出。每个单元对应一条主链路上的核心子系统，讲义之间存在严格的上下游依赖（例如 fabric 比特流依赖模块图与 architecture 比特流），保证读者按顺序学习时不会出现知识断层。\n\n专家层（u9–u10）面向二次开发与架构取舍：存储器组/移位寄存器 bank、时钟网络、repack、tile 直连、GSB 压缩等高级机制，以及支撑库（util/mux/decoder/pcf/bus_group/mif 等）的内部实现，最后落到如何用 Shell<T> 框架新增命令、如何用回归测试与 CI 参与贡献。讲义数量（41 篇）与项目规模匹配，所有源码引用均经过实际核对，不依赖硬拆。",
  "units": [
    {
      "id": "u1",
      "title": "认识 OpenFPGA：项目定位、编译与首次运行",
      "level": "beginner",
      "order": 1,
      "lectures": [
        {
          "id": "u1-l1",
          "title": "OpenFPGA 是什么：FPGA IP 生成与完整 EDA 流程",
          "order": 1,
          "filename": "u1-l1-project-overview.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "介绍 OpenFPGA 作为开源 FPGA IP 生成器的定位、它覆盖的 Verilog-to-Bitstream 全流程，以及它在 EDA 生态（VPR、Yosys）中的角色。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "理解 FPGA IP 生成的含义与 OpenFPGA 的核心价值",
            "说出 OpenFPGA 端到端流程的主要阶段：综合、布局布线、fabric 构建、比特流/网表生成",
            "了解 OpenFPGA 与 VPR、Yosys 等子模块的协作关系"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "README.md",
            "VERSION.md",
            "docs/source/overview/figures/OpenFPGA_logo.png"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "项目说明 README",
            "版本信息"
          ],
          "practice_task": "阅读 README 与引用论文摘要，用一段话写出 OpenFPGA 解决了什么问题、它的输入和输出分别是什么，并画出 Verilog→Bitstream 的粗粒度流程框图。",
          "depends_on": [],
          "action": "new"
        },
        {
          "id": "u1-l2",
          "title": "仓库目录结构解析",
          "order": 2,
          "filename": "u1-l2-repository-structure.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "讲解仓库顶层目录布局：openfpga/ 核心引擎、libs/ 支撑库、openfpga_flow/ 流程脚本与数据、子模块（vtr-verilog-to-routing、yosys）、docs 与 dev。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "掌握仓库顶层各目录的职责划分",
            "区分核心引擎源码（openfpga/src）与可复用库（libs/）",
            "定位流程脚本、架构文件、任务与基准测试所在位置"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "README.md",
            "CMakeLists.txt",
            "openfpga.sh"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "仓库布局",
            "openfpga/ 引擎",
            "libs/ 库",
            "openfpga_flow/ 流程"
          ],
          "practice_task": "在仓库根目录下制作一张目录树速查表，标注 openfpga/src、libs、openfpga_flow/scripts、openfpga_flow/openfpga_arch、openfpga_flow/vpr_arch、openfpga_flow/tasks 各自存放什么。",
          "depends_on": [
            "u1-l1"
          ],
          "action": "new"
        },
        {
          "id": "u1-l3",
          "title": "从源码编译与运行环境搭建",
          "order": 3,
          "filename": "u1-l3-build-and-run.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "讲解如何用 Makefile + CMake 编译 OpenFPGA，子模块初始化（checkout），构建类型与目标（make compile / cmake_goals=openfpga），以及 openfpga.sh 环境变量脚本的作用。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "掌握 make checkout 与 make compile 的完整构建流程",
            "理解 BUILD_TYPE、CMAKE_FLAGS、OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER 等构建选项",
            "学会 source openfpga.sh 配置 OPENFPGA_PATH 等环境变量"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "Makefile",
            "CMakeLists.txt",
            "openfpga.sh",
            "Dockerfile"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "Makefile 构建系统",
            "CMake 配置",
            "子模块 checkout",
            "openfpga.sh 环境脚本"
          ],
          "practice_task": "执行 make checkout 初始化子模块，再用 make compile 构建 openfpga 可执行文件，确认 build 目录下生成了 openfpga 二进制，并运行 openfpga --version。",
          "depends_on": [
            "u1-l2"
          ],
          "action": "new"
        },
        {
          "id": "u1-l4",
          "title": "运行第一个 FPGA 设计流",
          "order": 4,
          "filename": "u1-l4-first-fpga-flow.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "用 openfpga_flow 提供的 Python 脚本与任务配置跑通一个最小示例（如 and2），理解 run_fpga_flow.py 单次流程与 run_fpga_task.py 批量任务的区别，以及 task.conf 的结构。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "区分 run-task / run-flow / rerun-task 等 openfpga.sh 快捷命令",
            "读懂 task.conf 的 [GENERAL]/[OpenFPGA_SHELL]/[ARCHITECTURES]/[BENCHMARKS] 等段落",
            "成功跑通一个 micro_benchmark 并定位输出目录"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "openfpga.sh",
            "openfpga_flow/scripts/run_fpga_flow.py",
            "openfpga_flow/scripts/run_fpga_task.py",
            "openfpga_flow/tasks/basic_tests/full_testbench/configuration_chain/config/task.conf"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "run_fpga_task.py 任务调度",
            "run_fpga_flow.py 单次流程",
            "task.conf 配置",
            "openfpga.sh 快捷函数"
          ],
          "practice_task": "source openfpga.sh 后运行 run-task basic_tests/full_testbench/configuration_chain，观察 run 目录产出，并用 goto-task 进入结果目录查看生成的 fabric 网表与比特流。",
          "depends_on": [
            "u1-l3"
          ],
          "action": "new"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "u2",
      "title": "OpenFPGA Shell 入门：入口、命令与全局数据",
      "level": "beginner",
      "order": 2,
      "lectures": [
        {
          "id": "u2-l1",
          "title": "openfpga 程序入口与三种运行模式",
          "order": 1,
          "filename": "u2-l1-shell-entrypoint.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "从 main.cpp 出发，跟踪 OpenfpgaShell::start() 如何解析命令行参数并进入交互模式、脚本模式或 execute 模式。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "理解 main.cpp → OpenfpgaShell::start() 的启动链路",
            "区分 interactive / script (-f) / execute (-x) / batch 四种运行模式",
            "掌握 --file、--execute、--version、--help 等启动选项"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "openfpga/src/main.cpp",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_shell.cpp",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_shell.h",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_title.cpp"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "main 入口",
            "OpenfpgaShell::start",
            "shell 运行模式",
            "标题与版本输出"
          ],
          "practice_task": "分别用 openfpga（交互，输入 help 再 exit）、openfpga -f example_script.openfpga（脚本）、openfpga -x 'version; exit'（execute）三种方式启动，对比输出差异。",
          "depends_on": [
            "u1-l3"
          ],
          "action": "new"
        },
        {
          "id": "u2-l2",
          "title": "命令分组与注册机制",
          "order": 2,
          "filename": "u2-l2-command-registration.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "讲解 OpenFPGA 的七大命令类别（VPR、setup、verilog、bitstream、spice、sdc、basic）及其在 openfpga_shell.cpp 中通过 add_*_commands() 的注册顺序，列出最常用的用户命令。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "说出七大命令类别及其职责（如 FPGA-Verilog 负责网表生成）",
            "识别 read_openfpga_arch、link_openfpga_arch、build_fabric、repack、build_fabric_bitstream、write_fabric_verilog 等核心命令",
            "理解命令注册顺序与类别归属的来源（*_command_template.h）"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_shell.cpp",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_setup_command_template.h",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_bitstream_command_template.h",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_verilog_command_template.h",
            "openfpga/src/vpr_wrapper/vpr_command.cpp"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "命令类别注册",
            "setup 命令组",
            "bitstream 命令组",
            "verilog/sdc/spice 命令组",
            "vpr 命令"
          ],
          "practice_task": "在交互式 shell 中运行 help，把列出的命令按七大类别归类整理成一张表，并为每个类别各挑一个命令用 --help 查看其选项。",
          "depends_on": [
            "u2-l1"
          ],
          "action": "new"
        },
        {
          "id": "u2-l3",
          "title": "OpenfpgaContext：贯穿全流程的全局数据中枢",
          "order": 3,
          "filename": "u2-l3-openfpga-context.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "讲解 OpenfpgaContext 作为命令间数据交换的唯一枢纽，它继承自 VPR Context，聚合了 arch、module_graph、bitstream、mux_lib 等所有核心数据，并通过 const 访问器与 mutable 访问器控制读写。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "理解 OpenfpgaContext 为何只创建一次、不可拷贝",
            "识别 context 中的关键数据成员（arch_、module_graph_、bitstream_manager_、device_rr_gsb_ 等）",
            "掌握 const 访问器（只读）与 mutable 访问器（可写）的使用约定"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_context.h",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_flow_manager.h",
            "openfpga/src/base/openfpga_shell.h"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "OpenfpgaContext 数据聚合",
            "访问器设计模式",
            "FlowManager 流程状态"
          ],
          "practice_task": "在 openfpga_context.h 中找出与「架构、模块图、比特流、多路选择器库」对应的成员与访问器，画出命令之间通过 context 传递数据的示意图（如 read_openfpga_arch 写 arch_，build_fabric 读 arch_ 写 module_graph_）。",
          "depends_on": [
            "u2-l2"
          ],
          "action": "new"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "u3",
      "title": "架构描述与输入文件",
      "level": "beginner",
      "order": 3,
      "lectures": [
        {
          "id": "u3-l1",
          "title": "两套架构文件：VPR arch 与 openfpga_arch",
          "order": 1,
          "filename": "u3-l1-two-arch-files.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "讲清 OpenFPGA 需要两套互补的架构描述：VPR 架构 XML 描述器件结构（tileable、逻辑块、布线），openfpga_arch.xml 描述电路级物理实现（电路模型、配置协议）。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "区分 VPR 架构 XML 与 openfpga_arch.xml 的职责边界",
            "理解 task.conf 中 arch0 与 openfpga_arch_file 两个配置项分别指向哪种文件",
            "认识 openfpga_flow/vpr_arch 与 openfpga_flow/openfpga_arch 目录的内容"
          ],
```

## 前置讲义摘要（你必须基于这些已建立的认知继续，不要重复，要承接）

### u1-l1 OpenFPGA 是什么：FPGA IP 生成与完整 EDA 流程

本讲是手册开篇，旨在建立全局地图。核心结论：OpenFPGA 是首个有流片验证（silicon proofs）的开源 FPGA IP 生成器——它帮用户「造 FPGA 并给出配套 CAD 工具」，而非「在已有 FPGA 上跑设计」。它用一份 XML 架构描述同时自动生成完整 FPGA fabric 的 Verilog 网表与比特流工具，把传统一年以上的手工流程压到约一天。端到端流程分四阶段：综合（Yosys）→ 布局布线打包（VPR）→ fabric 构建（OpenFPGA）→ 网表/比特流/约束生成（OpenFPGA）。输入为用户 Verilog + VPR 架构 XML + openfpga_arch.xml；输出为 fabric Verilog 网表、配置比特流、SDC 时序约束、可选 SPICE 网表与自检 testbench。项目由 FPGA-Verilog、FPGA-SDC、FPGA-Bitstream、FPGA-SPICE 四部分组成；版本号集中于 VERSION.md（当前 1.2.4307）作单一数据源。本讲引入的关键术语：FPGA、可编程 fabric、比特流、EDA、综合、布局布线、VPR、Yosys、fabric 构建，供后续讲义承接。
### u1-l2 仓库目录结构解析

本讲解析 OpenFPGA 仓库目录结构，将顶层划分为 5 大功能区：核心引擎 `openfpga/`、可复用支撑库 `libs/`、流程脚本与数据 `openfpga_flow/`、第三方子模块（VPR、Yosys、yosys-slang）、文档与工程化。核心结论：顶层 `CMakeLists.txt` 的三条 `add_subdirectory`（vtr→libs→openfpga）是编译依赖顺序的权威证据，而 `openfpga_flow/`、`docs/` 等不参与 C++ 编译。`openfpga/src/` 按流程阶段拆为 `base/`、`fabric/`、`mux_lib/`、`repack/`、`fpga_bitstream/`、`fpga_verilog/`、`fpga_spice/`、`fpga_sdc/`、`annotation/` 等子系统目录；`libs/` 含 13 个低耦合可复用库（如 `libopenfpgautil`、`libarchopenfpga`、`libopenfpgashell`），是引擎的积木。本讲引入的关键术语：git 子模块（克隆后目录为空，须 `make checkout` 填充）、构建系统（CMake 生成 Makefile，顶层工程名为 `OpenFPGA-tool-suites`）、引擎与库的分离，以及 `openfpga_flow/` 下的流程脚本（`run_fpga_task.py`、`run_fpga_flow.py`）、回归任务（每个含 `config/task.conf`）与两套架构 XML（`vpr_arch/` 描述器件结构、`openfpga_arch/` 描述电路级物理实现，二者职责边界是 u3 的核心内容）。版本号单一数据源为 `VERSION.md`。

---

## 本讲义规格

- id: u1-l3
- 文件名: u1-l3-build-and-run.md
- 写入路径: OpenFPGA-tutorial/u1-l3-build-and-run.md
- 标题: 从源码编译与运行环境搭建
- 学习阶段: beginner
- 主题: 讲解如何用 Makefile + CMake 编译 OpenFPGA，子模块初始化（checkout），构建类型与目标（make compile / cmake_goals=openfpga），以及 openfpga.sh 环境变量脚本的作用。
- 学习目标: 掌握 make checkout 与 make compile 的完整构建流程；理解 BUILD_TYPE、CMAKE_FLAGS、OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER 等构建选项；学会 source openfpga.sh 配置 OPENFPGA_PATH 等环境变量
- 应覆盖的最小模块: Makefile 构建系统，CMake 配置，子模块 checkout，openfpga.sh 环境脚本
- 关键源码: Makefile，CMakeLists.txt，openfpga.sh，Dockerfile
- 代码实践任务: 执行 make checkout 初始化子模块，再用 make compile 构建 openfpga 可执行文件，确认 build 目录下生成了 openfpga 二进制，并运行 openfpga --version。
- 依赖讲义: u1-l2

---

## 任务

请按照 worker prompt 生成这一篇讲义。

要求：

1. 只生成 `OpenFPGA-tutorial/u1-l3-build-and-run.md` 这一个文件。
2. 必须结合真实源码。
3. 必须包含代码实践。
4. 必须使用永久链接引用源码。
5. new/rebuild 模式下从零写入。
6. update 模式下先读取旧文件，再结合 diff 更新。
7. 不要修改源码。
8. 不要写其他文件。

完成后，用一句话总结本讲义覆盖的最小模块。

## 项目学习路线（大纲方法论）

# 项目学习手册·大纲规划 Planner

## 角色

你是资深技术教育专家、源码阅读导师和项目学习路线设计者。

你运行在被分析项目的根目录内。

你可以使用：

- `Read`
- `Grep`
- `Glob`
- 只读 `git` 命令，例如 `git log`、`git diff`、`git show`、`git ls-files`

你不能：

- 修改源码
- 写入任何 `.md` 文件
- 输出 JSON 以外的文字

你的唯一产出是一个学习手册大纲 manifest JSON。

---

## 总目标

为当前项目规划一套「从零开始、由浅入深、结合源码和代码实践」的学习手册。

这套手册会被拆分成多篇 Markdown 讲义，后续 worker 会根据 manifest 逐篇生成。

每篇讲义应该满足：

1. 面向初学者也能读懂。
2. 只讲一个相对独立的主题。
3. 必须结合真实源码。
4. 必须包含一个可操作的代码实践任务。
5. 讲义之间有清晰依赖关系。

---

## 源码探查顺序

请按以下顺序理解项目，不要一开始就深入细节：

1. 项目说明
   - README
   - docs
   - examples
   - tutorials

2. 构建与运行方式
   - package.json
   - Cargo.toml
   - pyproject.toml
   - go.mod
   - pom.xml
   - Makefile
   - Dockerfile
   - CI 配置

3. 项目入口
   - CLI 入口
   - Web 服务入口
   - main 文件
   - library export 文件
   - examples 入口

4. 目录结构
   - src
   - lib
   - app
   - packages
   - crates
   - tests

5. 核心流程
   - 初始化流程
   - 配置加载
   - 请求/任务/数据处理主链路
   - 插件、扩展、调度、存储等核心机制

6. 测试与示例
   - 单元测试
   - 集成测试
   - benchmark
   - example usage

---

## 学习路线设计原则

请把学习手册设计成三层：

1. 入门层 beginner
   目标：让读者知道项目是什么、怎么运行、目录如何组织、核心入口在哪里。

2. 进阶层 intermediate
   目标：让读者理解主要模块、核心调用链、关键数据结构和配置机制。

3. 专家层 advanced
   目标：让读者理解扩展点、性能、并发、错误处理、测试、二次开发和架构取舍。

---

## 讲义拆分规则

- 每篇讲义只解决一个主要问题。
- 每篇讲义包含 2 到 5 个最小模块。
- 每篇讲义必须有一个 `practice_task`，描述读者要完成的代码实践。
- 每篇讲义的源码范围要适中，通常引用 1 到 6 个关键源码文件。
- 大型项目可以拆成 30 篇以上讲义；中型项目 15 到 30 篇；小型项目 8 到 15 篇。
- 不要为了数量硬拆，逻辑优先。
- 第一单元必须帮助读者从零开始，包括项目定位、运行方式、目录结构、入口文件。
- 后续单元再进入核心模块、源码机制、扩展实践。

---

## mode=full

首次生成大纲时：

1. 阅读项目关键文件。
2. 理解项目定位、技术栈、运行方式和核心模块。
3. 设计从零开始的学习路径。
4. 输出完整 manifest。
5. 所有讲义的 `action` 都必须是 `"new"`。

---

## mode=incremental

增量更新时：

1. 读取 stdin 中提供的现有 manifest。
2. 阅读项目中已有的 `<项目名>-tutorial/` 讲义目录，理解旧结构。
3. 使用：

   - `git diff previous_head..current_head`
   - `git log`
   - `git show`

   分析代码变化。

4. 输出更新后的完整 manifest。

每篇讲义的 `action` 按以下规则设置：

- `"keep"`
  代码变化不影响这篇讲义，无需重写。

- `"update"`
  小范围改动，例如函数重命名、参数调整、局部逻辑变化、链接行号变化。

- `"new"`
  新增功能、新增模块、新增重要机制，需要新增讲义。

- `"rebuild"`
  架构、主流程、公共接口、核心模型发生重大变化，旧讲义需要重建。

如果某篇旧讲义已经不再适合当前项目结构，可以从 manifest 中移除。

---

## manifest 输出格式

只输出严格 JSON，不要输出 Markdown，不要输出解释文字。

```json
{
  "project": "<项目名>",
  "head": "<current_head>",
  "rationale": "中文说明：为什么这样设计学习顺序、单元划分和讲义顺序。",
  "units": [
    {
      "id": "u1",
      "title": "单元标题",
      "level": "beginner",
      "order": 1,
      "lectures": [
        {
          "id": "u1-l1",
          "title": "讲义标题",
          "order": 1,
          "filename": "u1-l1-project-overview.md",
          "level": "beginner",
          "topic": "本讲义要讲什么，用 1 到 3 句中文说明。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "学习目标 1",
            "学习目标 2"
          ],
          "source_files": [
            "README.md",
            "src/main.ts"
          ],
          "minimal_modules": [
            "模块 1",
            "模块 2"
          ],
          "practice_task": "本讲义对应的代码实践任务。",
          "depends_on": [],
          "action": "new"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## 字段要求

- `project`：项目名。
- `head`：当前 git HEAD。
- `rationale`：中文，一段即可。
- `unit.id`：格式为 `u1`、`u2`、`u3`。
- `lecture.id`：格式为 `u1-l1`、`u1-l2`。
- `filename`：
  - 必须全局唯一。
  - 必须小写。
  - 使用连字符。
  - 必须以 `.md` 结尾。
  - 文件位于 `<项目名>-tutorial/` 目录下。
- `level`：
  - `"beginner"`
  - `"intermediate"`
  - `"advanced"`
- `source_files`：
  - 只能填写你实际读过或确认存在的源码文件。
  - 不要编造文件路径。
- `depends_on`：
  - 使用讲义 id。
  - 没有依赖时填写空数组。
- `action`：
  - full 模式全部为 `"new"`。
  - incremental 模式使用 `"keep"`、`"update"`、`"new"`、`"rebuild"`。

---

## 重要约束

- 只基于真实源码和项目文件规划。
- 不确定的地方写 `"待确认"`。
- 不要编造不存在的模块、命令、接口或源码文件。
- 输出必须是合法 JSON。

```json
          "topic": "讲解回归测试体系（.github/workflows、regression_test_scripts、openfpga.sh 的 run-regression-local）、VPR wrapper 集成方式、代码格式化（clang-format/xml/py），以及 dev/ 目录的开发者工具与贡献流程。",
          "learning_goals": [
            "掌握如何用 run-task 与回归脚本本地验证改动",
            "理解 vpr_wrapper 如何以 MACRO 方式集成 VPR",
            "认识项目的代码风格工具与贡献规范"
          ],
          "source_files": [

```

## 前置讲义摘要（你必须基于这些已建立的认知继续，不要重复，要承接）

### u1-l1 OpenFPGA 是什么：FPGA IP 生成与完整 EDA 流程

本讲是手册开篇，旨在建立全局地图。核心结论：OpenFPGA 是首个有流片验证（silicon proofs）的开源 FPGA IP 生成器——它帮用户「造 FPGA 并给出配套 CAD 工具」，而非「在已有 FPGA 上跑设计」。它用一份 XML 架构描述同时自动生成完整 FPGA fabric 的 Verilog 网表与比特流工具，把传统一年以上的手工流程压到约一天。端到端流程分四阶段：综合（Yosys）→ 布局布线打包（VPR）→ fabric 构建（OpenFPGA）→ 网表/比特流/约束生成（OpenFPGA）。输入为用户 Verilog + VPR 架构 XML + openfpga_arch.xml；输出为 fabric Verilog 网表、配置比特流、SDC 时序约束、可选 SPICE 网表与自检 testbench。项目由 FPGA-Verilog、FPGA-SDC、FPGA-Bitstream、FPGA-SPICE 四部分组成；版本号集中于 VERSION.md（当前 1.2.4307）作单一数据源。本讲引入的关键术语：FPGA、可编程 fabric、比特流、EDA、综合、布局布线、VPR、Yosys、fabric 构建，供后续讲义承接。
### u1-l2 仓库目录结构解析

本讲解析 OpenFPGA 仓库目录结构，将顶层划分为 5 大功能区：核心引擎 `openfpga/`、可复用支撑库 `libs/`、流程脚本与数据 `openfpga_flow/`、第三方子模块（VPR、Yosys、yosys-slang）、文档与工程化。核心结论：顶层 `CMakeLists.txt` 的三条 `add_subdirectory`（vtr→libs→openfpga）是编译依赖顺序的权威证据，而 `openfpga_flow/`、`docs/` 等不参与 C++ 编译。`openfpga/src/` 按流程阶段拆为 `base/`、`fabric/`、`mux_lib/`、`repack/`、`fpga_bitstream/`、`fpga_verilog/`、`fpga_spice/`、`fpga_sdc/`、`annotation/` 等子系统目录；`libs/` 含 13 个低耦合可复用库（如 `libopenfpgautil`、`libarchopenfpga`、`libopenfpgashell`），是引擎的积木。本讲引入的关键术语：git 子模块（克隆后目录为空，须 `make checkout` 填充）、构建系统（CMake 生成 Makefile，顶层工程名为 `OpenFPGA-tool-suites`）、引擎与库的分离，以及 `openfpga_flow/` 下的流程脚本（`run_fpga_task.py`、`run_fpga_flow.py`）、回归任务（每个含 `config/task.conf`）与两套架构 XML（`vpr_arch/` 描述器件结构、`openfpga_arch/` 描述电路级物理实现，二者职责边界是 u3 的核心内容）。版本号单一数据源为 `VERSION.md`。

---

## 本讲义规格

- id: u1-l3
- 文件名: u1-l3-build-and-run.md
- 写入路径: OpenFPGA-tutorial/u1-l3-build-and-run.md
- 标题: 从源码编译与运行环境搭建
- 学习阶段: beginner
- 主题: 讲解如何用 Makefile + CMake 编译 OpenFPGA，子模块初始化（checkout），构建类型与目标（make compile / cmake_goals=openfpga），以及 openfpga.sh 环境变量脚本的作用。
- 学习目标: 掌握 make checkout 与 make compile 的完整构建流程；理解 BUILD_TYPE、CMAKE_FLAGS、OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER 等构建选项；学会 source openfpga.sh 配置 OPENFPGA_PATH 等环境变量
- 应覆盖的最小模块: Makefile 构建系统，CMake 配置，子模块 checkout，openfpga.sh 环境脚本
- 关键源码: Makefile，CMakeLists.txt，openfpga.sh，Dockerfile
- 代码实践任务: 执行 make checkout 初始化子模块，再用 make compile 构建 openfpga 可执行文件，确认 build 目录下生成了 openfpga 二进制，并运行 openfpga --version。
- 依赖讲义: u1-l2

---

1. 只生成 `OpenFPGA-tutorial/u1-l3-build-and-run.md` 这一个文件。

4. 必须使用永久链接引用源码。
5. new/rebuild 模式下从零写入。
6. update 模式下先读取旧文件，再结合 diff 更新。
7. 不要修改源码。
8. 不要写其他文件。

完成后，用一句话总结本讲义覆盖的最小模块。

file.content:
# 
# Top Makefile
# ------------
#
# Top-level makefile to compile the codebase
#
# Following options are available
# 
# .. option:: BUILD_TYPE=<string>
#
#  Pick the type of compilation. Can be either ``release`` or ``debug``. By default, release mode is selected (full optimization on runtime).
#
# .. option:: CMAKE_FLAGS=<string>
#
#  Force compilation flags for CMake to generate Makefiles

BUILD_TYPE ?= release
# Convert to lower case for consistency
BUILD_TYPE := $(shell echo ${BUILD_TYPE} | tr '[:upper:]' '[lower]')
# Trim any _pgo or _strict in the build type name (since it would not match any of CMake's standard build types
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE := $(shell echo ${BUILD_TYPE} | sed 's/_\?pgo//' | sed 's/_\?strict//')

INTERNAL_CMAKE_FLAGS =
BUILD_INSTALLER ?= ON
# Convert to lower case for consistency
#BUILD_INSTALLER := $(shell echo ${BUILD_INSTALLER} | tr '[:upper:]' '[lower]')
INTERNAL_CMAKE_FLAGS += -DOPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER=${BUILD_INSTALLER}

INSTALL_DOC ?= ON
# Convert to lower case for consistency
#INSTALL_DOC := $(shell echo ${INSTALL_DOC} | tr '[:upper:]' '[lower]')
INTERNAL_CMAKE_FLAGS += -DOPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC=${INSTALL_DOC}

# Allow users to pass parameters to cmake, without defining build types
# e.g. make CMAKE_FLAGS="-DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=g++-9'
override CMAKE_FLAGS := -G 'Unix Makefiles' -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${BUILD_TYPE} ${INTERNAL_CMAKE_FLAGS} ${CMAKE_FLAGS}

# -s : Suppress makefile output (e.g. entering/leaving directories)
# --output-sync target : For parallel compilation ensure output for each target is synchronized (make version >= 4.0)
MAKEFLAGS := -s

# Directory to build the codes
SOURCE_DIR :=${PWD}
BUILD_DIR ?= build
CMAKE_GOALS = all
INSTALLER_TYPE=STGZ

# Find CMake command from system variable, otherwise use a default one
ifeq ($(origin CMAKE_COMMAND),undefined)
#Check for the cmake executable
CMAKE_COMMAND := $(shell command -v cmake 2> /dev/null)
else
CMAKE_COMMAND := ${CMAKE_COMMAND}
endif

# Define executables
PYTHON_EXEC ?= python3
CLANG_FORMAT_EXEC ?= clang-format-14
XML_FORMAT_EXEC ?= xmllint
PYTHON_FORMAT_EXEC ?= black

# Put it first so that "make" without argument is like "make help".
export COMMENT_EXTRACT

# Put it first so that "make" without argument is like "make help".
help:
	@${PYTHON_EXEC} -c "$$COMMENT_EXTRACT"

.PHONY: help

checkout: 
# Update all the submodules
	git submodule init
	git submodule update --init --recursive

prebuild:
# Run cmake to generate Makefile under the build directory, before compilation
	@mkdir -p ${BUILD_DIR} && \
	echo "cd ${BUILD_DIR} && ${CMAKE_COMMAND} ${CMAKE_FLAGS} ${SOURCE_DIR}" && \
	cd ${BUILD_DIR} && ${CMAKE_COMMAND} ${CMAKE_FLAGS} ${SOURCE_DIR}

compile: | prebuild
# Compile the code base. By default, all the targets will be compiled
# Following options are available
# .. option:: CMAKE_GOALS
#
#   Define the target for cmake to compile. for example, ``cmake_goals=openfpga`` indicates that only openfpga binary will be compiled 
	echo "Building target(s): ${CMAKE_GOALS}"
	@+${MAKE} -C ${BUILD_DIR} ${CMAKE_GOALS}

list_cmake_targets: | prebuild
# Show the targets available to be built, which can be specified through ``CMAKE_GOALS`` when compile
	cd ${BUILD_DIR} && make help && cd -

all: checkout
# A shortcut command to run checkout and compile in serial
	@+${MAKE} compile

installer:
# Create the package for users to install on their computer with pre-built binaries
#
# Following options are available
# .. option:: INSTALLER_TYPE
#
#   Define the type of installer, can be [STGZ|DEB|IFW] (default: STGZ). for example, ``INSTALLER_TYPE=DEB`` indicates to create a DEB package
	cpack --config ${BUILD_DIR}/CPackConfig.cmake -G ${INSTALLER_TYPE}

format-cpp:
# Format all the C/C++ files under this project, excluding submodules
	for f in `find libs openfpga -iname *.cpp -o -iname *.hpp -o -iname *.c -o -iname *.h`; \
	do \
	${CLANG_FORMAT_EXEC} --style=file -i $${f} || exit 1; \
	done

format-xml:
# Format all the XML files under this project, excluding submodules
	for f in `find openfpga_flow/vpr_arch openfpga_flow/openfpga_arch -iname *.xml`; \
	do \
	XMLLINT_INDENT="  " && ${XML_FORMAT_EXEC} --format $${f} --output $${f} || exit 1; \
	done

format-py:
# Format all the python scripts under this project, excluding submodules
	for f in `find openfpga_flow/scripts -iname *.py`; \
	do \
	${PYTHON_FORMAT_EXEC} $${f} --line-length 100 || exit 1; \
	done

format-all: format-cpp format-xml format-py
# Format all the C/C++, XML and Python codes

clean:
# Remove current build results
	rm -rf ${BUILD_DIR} yosys/install

# Functions to extract comments from Makefiles
define COMMENT_EXTRACT
import re
with open ('Makefile', 'r' ) as f:
    matches = re.finditer('^([a-zA-Z-_]*):.*\n#(.*)', f.read(), flags=re.M)
    for _, match in enumerate(matches, start=1):
        header, content = match[1], match[2]
        print(f"  {header:10} {content}")
endef

#!/bin/bash
#title           : openfpga.sh
#description     : This script provides shortcut commands <bash functions>
#                  for several simple operations in OpenFPGA project
#author          : Ganesh Gore <ganesh.gore@utah.edu>
#==============================================================================

if [ -z $OPENFPGA_PATH ]; then
    echo "OPENFPGA_PATH variable not found"
    export OPENFPGA_PATH=$(pwd);
    echo "Setting OPENFPGA_PATH=${OPENFPGA_PATH}"
else
    echo "OPENFPGA_PATH=${OPENFPGA_PATH}"
fi
export OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH="${OPENFPGA_PATH}/openfpga_flow/scripts"
export OPENFPGA_TASK_PATH="${OPENFPGA_PATH}/openfpga_flow/tasks"
if [ -z $PYTHON_EXEC ]; then export PYTHON_EXEC="python3"; fi

# This function checks the path and
# raises warning if the command is not executing
# inside current OpendFPGA folder
check_execution_path (){
    if [[ $1 != *"${OPENFPGA_PATH}"* ]]; then
        echo -e "\e[33mCommand is not executed from configured OPENFPGA directory\e[0m"
    fi
}

run-task-with-modelsim () {
    echo "Script as to be run as \"run-task-with-modelsim task_name --maxthreads nb_threads other_run-modelsim_options\""
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_fpga_task.py $1 $2 $3
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_modelsim.py "$@"
}

create-task () {
    if [ -z $1 ]; then
        echo "requires task name create-task <task_name>"
        return
    fi
    if [ -d $1 ]; then
        echo "Task $1 already exists"
        return
    fi
    template="template_tasks/fabric_netlist_gen_template"
    if [ ${#2} -ge 1 ]; then
        if   [[ "$2" == "fabric_netlist_gen" ]]; then template="template_tasks/${2}_template/";
        elif [[ "$2" == "fabric_verification" ]]; then template="template_tasks/${2}_template/";
        elif [[ "$2" == "frac-lut-arch-explore" ]]; then template="template_tasks/${2}_template/";
        elif [[ "$2" == "vtr_benchmarks" ]]; then template="template_tasks/${2}_template/";
        else template="$2"
        fi
    fi
    if [ ! -f $OPENFPGA_PATH/openfpga_flow/tasks/${template}/config/task.conf ]; then
        echo "Template project [${template}] does not exist" ; return;
    fi
    echo "Creating task     $1"
    echo "Template project  ${template}"
    mkdir -p $1
    cp -r $OPENFPGA_PATH/openfpga_flow/tasks/${template}/* $1/
}

rerun-task () {
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_fpga_task.py "$@" --remove_run_dir all
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_fpga_task.py "$@"
}

run-task () {
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_fpga_task.py "$@"
}

clean-run () {
    rm -rf ./openfpga_flow/**/run???
}

clear-task-run () {
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_fpga_task.py "$@" --remove_run_dir all
}

run-modelsim () {
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_modelsim.py "$@"
}

run-flow () {
    $PYTHON_EXEC $OPENFPGA_SCRIPT_PATH/run_fpga_flow.py "$@"
}

# lists all the configure task in task directory
list-tasks () {
    echo "Repository Task"
    tree -P 'task.conf' --prune $OPENFPGA_TASK_PATH | sed "/.* task.conf/d" | sed "/.* config/d" | sed '$d'
    echo "Local Task"
    tree -P 'task.conf' --prune | sed "/.* task.conf/d" | sed "/.* config/d" | sed '$d'
}

# Switch directory to root of OpenFPGA
goto-root () {
    cd $OPENFPGA_PATH
}

# Run regression test locally
run-regression-local () {
    cd ${OPENFPGA_PATH}
    bash .github/workflows/*reg_test.sh
}

# Changes directory to task directory [goto_task <task_name> <run_num[default 0]>]
goto-task () {
    if [ -z $1 ]; then
        echo "requires task name goto_task <task_name> <run_num[default 0]>"
        return
    fi
    goto_path=$OPENFPGA_TASK_PATH/$1
    if [ -d $1 ]; then  goto_path=./$1; fi
    echo $goto_path
    # Selects the run directory
    run_num=""
    if [ ! -d $goto_path ]; then echo "Task directory not found"; return; fi
    if [[ "$2" =~ '^[0-9]+$' ]] ; then
        if ! [[ $2 == '0' ]] ; then run_num="$(printf run%03d $2)"; else run_num="latest"; fi
        if [ ! -d "$goto_path/$run_num" ]; then run_num="latest"; fi
    fi
    if [ ! -d $goto_path/$run_num ]; then
        echo "\e[33mTask run directory not found -" $goto_path/$run_num "\e[0m"
    else
        echo "Switching current dirctory to" $goto_path/$run_num
        cd $goto_path/$run_num
    fi
    # Selects benchmark directory
    select benchRun in $(ls -d **/arch | sed "s/\/arch//" | head -n 20)
    do
        [ -d ${benchRun} ] && cd ${benchRun}
        break
    done
}

# Clears environment variables and functions
unset-openfpga (){
    unset -v OPENFPGA_PATH
    unset -f list-tasks run-task run-flow goto-task goto-root >/dev/null 2>&1
}

# Allow autocompletion of task
if [[ $(ps -p $$ -oargs=) == *"zsh"* ]]; then
    autoload -U +X bashcompinit; bashcompinit;
fi

command -v shopt && shopt -s globstar
# TaskList=$(ls -tdalh ${OPENFPGA_TASK_PATH}/* | awk '{system("basename " $9)}' |  awk '{printf("%s ",$1)}')
RepoTaskList=$(ls -tdalh ${OPENFPGA_TASK_PATH}/**/task.conf  |
awk '{print $9}' | sed -e "s/\/config\/task.conf//" |
sed -e "s/${OPENFPGA_PATH//\//\\/}\/openfpga_flow\/tasks\///" |
awk '{printf("%s ",$1)}')

_TaskList()
{
  local cur
  COMPREPLY+=($( ls -R ./*/*/task.conf | sed -e "s/\/config\/task.conf//" | sed -e "s/^\.\///" | awk '{printf("%s ",$1)}' ) )
}

complete -W "${RepoTaskList}" -F _TaskList goto-task
complete -W "${RepoTaskList}" -F _TaskList run-task
complete -W "${RepoTaskList}" -F _TaskList run-modelsim
complete -W "${RepoTaskList}" create-task

1	cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
2	
3	# Include user-defined functions
4	list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/modules)
5	include(FilesToDirs)
6	include(SwigLib)
7	# Auto-enable ccache
8	include(SupportCcache)
9	
10	if (${CMAKE_VERSION} VERSION_GREATER "3.8")
11	    #For cmake >= 3.9 INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION behaviour we need to explicitly
12	    #set the cmake policy version number
13	    cmake_policy(VERSION 3.9) 
14	
15	    # If we are using verison < 3.9 then setting INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION
16	    # has no effect unless an Intel compiler is used
17	endif()
18	
19	## Set the default build type if not specified
20	if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)
21	    set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Release CACHE STRING
22	        "Choose the type of build: None, Debug, Release, RelWithDebInfo, MinSizeRel"
23	        FORCE)
24	endif()
25	message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")
26	
27	if(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR} STREQUAL ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR})
28	    message("CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR: ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}")
29	    message("CMAKE_BINARY_DIR: ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}")
30	    message(FATAL_ERROR "In-source builds not allowed. Use the Makefile wrapper (e.g. make), or create a new build directory and call cmake manually from there (e.g. mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake ..)")
31	endif()
32	
33	#We install to the source directory by default
34	if (CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX_INITIALIZED_TO_DEFAULT)
35	    set (CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}" CACHE PATH "default install path" FORCE)
36	endif()
37	
38	set(OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD "auto" CACHE STRING "Should OpenFPGA be compiled with interprocedural compiler optimizations?")
39	set_property(CACHE OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD PROPERTY STRINGS auto on off)
40	
41	# Disable IPO on Windows MSYS2 to avoid linker errors with complex STL templates
42	# LTO causes "two or more sections for .gnu.lto__ZNSt..." errors on MinGW64
43	if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
44	    message(STATUS "Disabling IPO on MSYS2 environment to avoid LTO linker conflicts")
45	    set(OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD "off" CACHE STRING "Should OpenFPGA be compiled with interprocedural compiler optimizations?" FORCE)
46	endif()
47	
48	# Synchronize IPO settings to submodules
49	set(VTR_IPO_BUILD ${OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD} CACHE STRING "Should verilog-to-routing be compiled with interprocedural compiler optimizations?" FORCE)
50	
51	#Allow the user to configure how much assertion checking should occur
52	set(VTR_ASSERT_LEVEL "2" CACHE STRING "VTR assertion checking level. 0: no assertions, 1: fast assertions, 2: regular assertions, 3: additional assertions with noticable run-time overhead, 4: all assertions")
53	set_property(CACHE VTR_ASSERT_LEVEL PROPERTY STRINGS 0 1 2 3 4)
54	
55	#Create the project 
56	project("OpenFPGA-tool-suites" C CXX)
57	
58	# Windows fixes
59	if (MSVC)
60	    add_compile_definitions(
61	        NOMINMAX
62	        _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS
63	    )
64	else()
65	    add_compile_definitions(NOMINMAX)
66	endif()
67	
68	
69	# Version number
70	file (STRINGS "VERSION.md" VERSION_NUMBER)
71	string (REPLACE "." ";" VERSION_LIST ${VERSION_NUMBER})
72	list(GET VERSION_LIST 0 OPENFPGA_VERSION_MAJOR)
73	list(GET VERSION_LIST 1 OPENFPGA_VERSION_MINOR)
74	list(GET VERSION_LIST 2 OPENFPGA_VERSION_PATCH)
75	set(OPENFPGA_VERSION_PRERELEASE "dev")
76	
77	
78	# Set the assertion level
79	add_definitions("-DVTR_ASSERT_LEVEL=${VTR_ASSERT_LEVEL}")
80	
81	# compiler flag configuration checks
82	include(CheckCXXCompilerFlag)
83	
84	# Options
85	## General options
86	option(OPENFPGA_WITH_YOSYS "Enable building Yosys" ON)
87	option(OPENFPGA_WITH_SLANG "Enable building Yosys Slang plugin" ON)
88	option(OPENFPGA_WITH_TEST "Enable testing build for codebase. Once enabled, make test can be run" ON)
89	option(OPENFPGA_WITH_VERSION "Enable version always-up-to-date when building codebase. Disable only when you do not care an accurate version number" ON)
90	option(OPENFPGA_WITH_SWIG "Enable SWIG interface when building codebase. Disable when you do not need high-level interfaces, such as Tcl/Python" ON)
91	option(OPENFPGA_ENABLE_STRICT_COMPILE "Specifies whether compiler warnings should be treated as errors (e.g. -Werror)" OFF)
92	option(OPENFPGA_UPDATE_UNIQUE_BLOCK_CAPN "Specifies whether to update capn'proto files required by unique block. Recommend only after any modification on  unique block parsers and data structures" OFF)
93	## Installer options
94	option(OPENFPGA_GUI_INSTALLER "Enable installer with a graphical user interface" ON)
95	option(OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER "Enable installer to be built" ON)
96	option(OPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC "Installer will include documentation" ON)
97	message(STATUS "CMAKE_OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER: ${OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER}")
98	message(STATUS "CMAKE_OPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC: ${OPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC}")
99	# Readline options
100	set(OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES "libreadline" "libedit" "standard")
101	set(OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE "libreadline" CACHE STRING "Select the type of readline function to use in shell interface")
102	# Attach the STRINGS property so GUI/TUI tools display a dropdown
103	set_property(CACHE OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE PROPERTY STRINGS ${OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES})
104	# Enforce validation on configure
105	if (NOT OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE IN_LIST OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES)
106	    message(FATAL_ERROR "Invalid value for OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE. Allowed values are: ${OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES}")
107	endif()
108	message(STATUS "Readline feature mode: ${OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE}")
109	
110	# Options pass on to VTR
111	
112	set(WITH_ABC ON CACHE BOOL "Enable building ABC in Verilog-to-Routing")
113	set(WITH_ODIN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building Odin in Verilog-to-Routing")
114	set(ODIN_DEBUG OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with debug flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
115	set(ODIN_WARN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with extra warning flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
116	set(ODIN_COVERAGE OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with coverage flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
117	set(ODIN_TIDY OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with clang tidy in Verilog-to-Routing")
118	set(ODIN_SANITIZE OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with sanitize flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
119	set(WITH_YOSYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building Yosys in Verilog-to-Routing")
120	set(WITH_PARMYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Yosys as elaborator and parmys-plugin as partial mapper")
121	set(ODIN_YOSYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with yosys in Verilog-to-Routing")
122	set(YOSYS_SV_UHDM_PLUGIN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building and installing Yosys SystemVerilog and UHDM plugins in Verilog-to-Routing")
123	set(YOSYS_F4PGA_PLUGINS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building and installing Yosys SystemVerilog and UHDM plugins")
124	set(VTR_ENABLE_VERSION ${OPENFPGA_WITH_VERSION} CACHE BOOL "Enable version always-up-to-date when building codebase. Disable only when you do not care an accurate version number")
125	set(WITH_PARMYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Yosys as elaborator and parmys-plugin as partial mapper")
126	set(VPR_ENABLE_INTERCHANGE ON CACHE BOOL "Enable FPGA interchange")
127	# TODO: OpenFPGA and VPR has different requirements on no-warning build, e.g., on OS and compiler versions
128	#set(VTR_ENABLE_STRICT_COMPILE ${OPENFPGA_ENABLE_STRICT_COMPILE} CACHE BOOL "Specifies whether compiler warnings should be treated as errors (e.g. -Werror)")
129	
130	# Override WGET Options
131	if (WIN32)
132	  if(MSVC)
133	    set(WGET_OUTPUT_OPTION "-o" CACHE STRING "Wget output option" FORCE)
134	  elseif(DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
135	    message(STATUS "Wget specifically using the Msys2 toolchain")
136	    set(WGET_OUTPUT_OPTION "-O" CACHE STRING "Wget output option" FORCE)
137	  endif()
138	elseif(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
139	  set(WGET_OUTPUT_OPTION "-O" CACHE STRING "Wget output option" FORCE)
140	endif()
141	
142	# TCL file/lib required to link with SWIG generated wrapper
143	if (OPENFPGA_WITH_SWIG)
144	#Find Tcl
145	  find_package(TCL REQUIRED)
146	  if(NOT TCL_FOUND)
147	    message(FATAL_ERROR "TCL not found. Please install TCL development headers (e.g. tcl8.6-dev).")
148	  endif()
149	  message(STATUS "TCL_INCLUDE_PATH: ${TCL_INCLUDE_PATH}")
150	  message(STATUS "TCL_LIBRARY: ${TCL_LIBRARY}")
151	
152	#Find SWIG
153	  find_package(SWIG 3.0 REQUIRED)
154	  if (SWIG_VERSION VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL "4.1.0")
155	    message(WARNING "Using SWIG >= ${SWIG_VERSION} -flatstaticmethod flag for python")
156	  endif()
157	  include(UseSWIG)
158	endif()
159	
160	#Compiler flag configuration checks
161	include(CheckCXXCompilerFlag)
162	
163	#
164	# We require c++20 support
165	#
166	set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
167	set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
168	set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF) #No compiler specific extensions
169	
170	#
171	# Interprocedural optimization
172	#
173	#   Note that we manually clear the INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION flag on ABC later
174	#   to avoid cmake warnings
175	include(CheckIPOSupported)
176	check_ipo_supported(RESULT IPO_SUPPORTED)
177	if (OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD STREQUAL "on")
178	    if (IPO_SUPPORTED)
179	        message(STATUS "Building with IPO: on")
180	        set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION ON)
181	    else()
182	        message(ERROR "Building with IPO unsupported with this compiler!")
183	    endif()
184	elseif(OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD STREQUAL "auto")
185	    if (IPO_SUPPORTED AND NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "debug")
186	        message(STATUS "Building with IPO: on (auto)")
187	        set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION ON)
188	    else()
189	        message(STATUS "Building with IPO: off (auto)")
190	    endif()
191	else()
192	    message(STATUS "Building with IPO: off")
193	endif()
194	
195	if(NOT MSVC)
196	    # for GCC and Clang
197	    set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG} -O0 -g3")
198	    set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG} -O0 -g3")
199	endif()
200	
201	# Set WARN FLAGS
202	set(WARN_FLAGS "")
203	
204	if (MSVC)
205	  # Visual studio warnings 
206	  # Note that we do not use /Wall since it generates warnings about standard library headers
207	  set(WARN_FLAGS_TO_CHECK # the flags to check if the compiler supports
208	      "/W4" # Most warnings
209	     )
210	else ()
211	  set(WARN_FLAGS_TO_CHECK # the flags to check if the compiler supports
212	      #GCC-like
213	      "-Wall"                         #Most warnings, typically good
214	      "-Wextra"                       #Extra warning, usually good
215	      "-Wpedantic"                    #Ensure ISO compliance (i.e. no non-standard extensions)
216	      "-Wcast-qual"                   #Warn if cast removes qualifier (e.g. const char* -> char*)
217	      "-Wcast-align"                  #Warn if a cast causes memory alignment changes
218	      "-Wshadow"                      #Warn if local variable shadows another variable
219	      "-Wformat=2"                    #Sanity checks for printf-like formatting
220	      "-Wno-format-nonliteral"        # But don't worry about non-literal formtting (i.e. run-time printf format strings)
221	      "-Wlogical-op"                  #Checks for logical op when bit-wise expected
222	      "-Wmissing-declarations"        #Warn if a global function is defined with no declaration
223	      "-Wmissing-include-dirs"        #Warn if a user include directory is missing
224	      "-Wredundant-decls"             #Warn if there are overlapping declarations
225	      "-Wswitch-default"              #Warn if a switch has no default
226	      "-Wundef"                       #Warn if #if() preprocessor refers to an undefined directive
227	      "-Wunused"                      #Warn about unused variables/parameters
228	      "-Wunused-variable"             #Warn about variables that are not used
229	      "-Wunused-parameter"            #Warn about function parameters which are unused
230	      "-Wdisabled-optimization"       #Warn when optimizations are skipped (usually due to large/complex code)
231	      "-Wnoexcept"                    #Warn when functions should be noexcept (i.e. compiler know it doesn't throw)
232	      "-Woverloaded-virtual"          #Warn when a function declaration overrides a virtual method
233	      "-Wctor-dtor-privacy"           #Warn about inaccessible constructors/destructors
234	      "-Wnon-virtual-dtor"            #Warn about missing virtual destructors
235	      "-Wduplicated-cond"             #Warn about identical conditions in if-else chains
236	      "-Wduplicated-branches"         #Warn when different branches of an if-else chain are equivalent
237	      "-Wnull-dereference"            #Warn about null pointer dereference execution paths
238	      "-Wuninitialized"               #Warn about unitialized values
239	      "-Winit-self"                   #Warn about self-initialization
240	      "-Wcatch-value=3"               #Warn when catch statements don't catch by reference
241	      "-Wextra-semi"                  #Warn about redudnant semicolons
242	      "-Wimplicit-fallthrough=3"      #Warn about case fallthroughs, but allow 'fallthrough' comments to suppress warnings
243	      #GCC-like optional
244	      #"-Wsuggest-final-types"         #Suggest where 'final' would help if specified on a type methods
245	      #"-Wsuggest-final-methods"       #Suggest where 'final' would help if specified on methods
246	      #"-Wsuggest-override"            #Suggest where 'override' should be specified
247	      #"-Wold-style-cast"              #Warn about using c-style casts
248	      #"-Wconversion"                  #Warn when type conversions may change value
249	      #"-Wsign-conversion"             #Warn if a conversion may change the sign
250	      #"-Wpadded"                      #Will warn if additional padding is introduced to a struct/class. Turn on if optimizing class memory layouts
251	      #"-Wstrict-overflow=2"           #Warn if the compiler optimizes assuming signed overflow does not occur
252	      #"-Wfloat-equal"                 #Warn about using direct floating point equality
253	      #"-Wunsafe-loop-optimizations"   #Warn when loops can't be optimized
254	      #"-Wswitch-enum"                 #Warn about uncovered enumeration values in a switch (even if there is a default)
255	      #"-Wsign-promo"                  #Warn when overload resolution converts an unsigned type to signed when an unsigned overload exists
256	      #"-Wdouble-promotion"            #Warn when float is implicitly propted to double
257	      #"-Wuseless-cast"                #Warn about casts to the same type
258	      #"-Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant" #Warn about using '0' instead of nullptr
259	      )
260	endif()
261	
262	# check and see if the compiler supports the various warning flags
263	# and add valid flags
264	foreach (flag ${WARN_FLAGS_TO_CHECK})
265	  CHECK_CXX_COMPILER_FLAG(${flag} CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
266	  if (CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
267	    # flag supported, so enable it
268	    set (WARN_FLAGS "${WARN_FLAGS} ${flag}")
269	  endif()
270	endforeach()
271	
272	#Suppress IPO link warnings
273	set(IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS " ")
274	set(IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS_TO_CHECK
275	    "-Wno-null-dereference"
276	    )
277	foreach(flag ${IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS_TO_CHECK})
278	    CHECK_CXX_COMPILER_FLAG(${flag} CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
279	    if(CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
280	        #Flag supported, so enable it
281	        set(IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS "${IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS} ${flag}")
282	    endif()
283	endforeach()
284	
285	#
286	# Sanitizer flags
287	#
288	set(SANITIZE_FLAGS "")
289	if(OPENFPGA_ENABLE_SANITIZE)
290	    #Enable sanitizers
291	    # -fuse-ld=gold force the gold linker to be used (required for sanitizers, but not enabled by default on some systems)
292	    set(SANITIZE_FLAGS "-g -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=leak -fsanitize=undefined -fuse-ld=gold")
293	    message(STATUS "SANTIIZE_FLAGS: ${SANITIZE_FLAGS}")
294	    link_libraries("-static-libasan") #Fixes 'ASan runtime does not come first in initial library list'
295	endif()
296	
297	# Extra flags
298	set(SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS "")
299	if (OPENFPGA_WITH_SWIG)
300	    set(SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS "-fpic")
301	endif()
302	add_compile_options(${SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS})
303	
304	# Set final flags
305	#
306	separate_arguments(
307	    ADDITIONAL_FLAGS UNIX_COMMAND "${SANITIZE_FLAGS} ${PROFILING_FLAGS} ${COVERAGE_FLAGS} ${LOGGING_FLAGS} ${COLORED_COMPILE} ${EXTRA_FLAGS} ${SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS}"
308	    )
309	separate_arguments(
310	    WARN_FLAGS UNIX_COMMAND "${WARN_FLAGS}"
311	    )
312	
313	# 
314	# Sub-projects with their own compiler settings
315	#
316	add_subdirectory(vtr-verilog-to-routing)
317	
318	add_compile_options(${WARN_FLAGS}) #Add warn flags for VTR tools
319	add_compile_options(${ADDITIONAL_FLAGS})
320	link_libraries(${ADDITIONAL_FLAGS})
321	
322	# Unit Testing
323	#
324	if (OPENFPGA_WITH_TEST)
325	    enable_testing()
326	endif()
327	
328	# 
329	# Sub-projects to apply current complier settings
330	#
331	add_subdirectory(libs)
332	add_subdirectory(openfpga)
333	
334	# yosys compilation starts
335	
336	# Compilation options for yosys
337	include(CMakeParseArguments)
338	
339	##project(yosys)
340	
341	# Options to enable/disable dependencies
342	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_TCL, "Enable TCL parser integrated in yosys" ON)
343	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_ABC, "Enable ABC library integrated in yosys" ON)
344	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_PLUGINS, "Enable plug-in in yosys" ON)
345	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_READLINE, "Enable readline library in yosys" ON)
346	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_VERIFIC, "Enable verification library in yosys" OFF)
347	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_COVER, "Enable coverage test in yosys" ON)
348	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_LIBYOSYS, "Enable static library compiled yosys" OFF)
349	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_GPROF, "Enable profiling in compiled yosys" OFF)
350	option(YOSYS_ENABLE_NDEBUG, "Enable non-debugging feature in compiled yosys" OFF)
351	
352	#
353	## Search and link dependent packages
354	## We need readline to compile 
355	if (YOSYS_ENABLE_READLINE)
356	  find_package(Readline REQUIRED)
357	endif()
358	
359	#PugiXml has some deliberate switch fallthrough cases (as indicated by comments), but they
360	#are tagged as warnings with g++-7 (the comments don't match g++-7's suppression regexes).
361	#Since we don't want to change PugiXml (it is developed externally), we relax the warning
362	#level so no fallthrough warnings are generated
363	CHECK_CXX_COMPILER_FLAG("-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0" CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0)
364	if(CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0)
365	    target_compile_options(libpugixml PRIVATE "-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0")
366	endif()
367	
368	# Only patch abc makefile on Msys2 where linker complains
369	# Find the Python 3 interpreter
370	find_package(Python3 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Interpreter)
371	if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
372	    set(PY_PATCH_ABC_MAKEFILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/dev/patch_abc_makefile.py")
373	    set(ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/yosys/abc")
374	    set(ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH "Makefile")
375	    set(ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH "Makefile.patched")
376	    message(STATUS "Patching ${ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR}/${ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH}")
377	    add_custom_command(
378	        OUTPUT ${ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH}
379	        COMMAND "${Python3_EXECUTABLE}" "${PY_PATCH_ABC_MAKEFILE}" "${ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH}"
380	        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch ${ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH}
381	        COMMENT "Apply sed patch to ${ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR}/${ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH} for long linker command fix"
382	        DEPENDS "${PY_PATCH_ABC_MAKEFILE}"
383	        VERBATIM
384	        WORKING_DIRECTORY "${ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR}"
385	    )
386	    add_custom_target(patch_abc_makefile ALL DEPENDS ${ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH})
387	endif()
388	
389	# Once Yosys adapts to CMake. This will be much simplified
390	# Yosys build options
391	set(YOSYS_CONFIG_OPTION "config-gcc" CACHE STRING "Yosys configuration on environment") 
392	set(YOSYS_BUILD_OPTION "ENABLE_CCACHE=1" CACHE STRING "Yosys build options") 
393	set(SLANG_BUILD_CONFIG "" CACHE STRING "Slang build configuration on environment") 
394	set(SLANG_CMAKE_CONFIG "" CACHE STRING "Slang cmake configuration on environment") 
395	if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
396	    message(STATUS "Build Yosys in an MSYS2 MinGW-w64 environment")
397	    set(YOSYS_CONFIG_OPTION "config-msys2-64" CACHE STRING "Yosys configuration on environment" FORCE) 
398	    set(YOSYS_BUILD_OPTION "DISABLE_ABC_THREADS=1 ENABLE_CCACHE=1" CACHE STRING "Yosys build options on environment" FORCE) 
399	    set(SLANG_BUILD_CONFIG "-Wl,--exclude-all-symbols" CACHE STRING "Slang build configuration on environment" FORCE) 
400	    set(SLANG_CMAKE_CONFIG "" CACHE STRING "Slang cmake configuration on environment") 
401	endif() 
402	
403	# we will check if yosys already exist. if not then build it
404	if (OPENFPGA_WITH_YOSYS STREQUAL "ON")
405	    if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/bin/yosys)
406	        message(STATUS "Yosys pre-build exist so skipping it")
407	    else ()
408	        # run makefile provided, we pass-on the options to the local make file 
409	        add_custom_target(
410	            yosys ALL
411	            # add step to remove the 'built-in' quicklogic plugins code in yosys
412	            COMMAND $(MAKE) ${YOSYS_CONFIG_OPTION}
413	            COMMAND $(MAKE) install PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/ ${YOSYS_BUILD_OPTION}
414	            WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/yosys
415	            COMMENT "Compile Yosys with given Makefile"
416	        )
417	        # Add dependency on patched Makefile if on MinGW
418	        if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
419	          add_dependencies(yosys patch_abc_makefile)
420	        endif()  
421	        # yosys compilation ends
422	        # yosys-plugins compilation starts
423	        if (OPENFPGA_WITH_SLANG)
424	          add_custom_target(
425	              yosys-slang ALL
426	              COMMAND $(MAKE) install YOSYS_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/bin/ CMAKE_FLAGS+="-DPASS_NAME=read_slang ${SLANG_CMAKE_CONFIG}" LDFLAGS+="${SLANG_BUILD_CONFIG}"
427	              WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/yosys-slang
428	              DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/bin/yosys
429	              COMMENT "Compile Yosys-Slang with given Makefile"
430	          )
431	          add_dependencies(yosys-slang yosys)
432	        endif()
433	    endif()
434	endif()
435	
436	# For installer
437	if (OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER)
438	  include(OpenfpgaInstaller)
439	  include(OpenfpgaPackaging)
440	endif()
441

file.content:
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

# Include user-defined functions
list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/modules)
include(FilesToDirs)
include(SwigLib)
# Auto-enable ccache
include(SupportCcache)

if (${CMAKE_VERSION} VERSION_GREATER "3.8")
    #For cmake >= 3.9 INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION behaviour we need to explicitly
    #set the cmake policy version number
    cmake_policy(VERSION 3.9) 

    # If we are using verison < 3.9 then setting INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION
    # has no effect unless an Intel compiler is used
endif()

## Set the default build type if not specified
if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE)
    set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Release CACHE STRING
        "Choose the type of build: None, Debug, Release, RelWithDebInfo, MinSizeRel"
        FORCE)
endif()
message(STATUS "CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE: ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}")

if(${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR} STREQUAL ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR})
    message("CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR: ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}")
    message("CMAKE_BINARY_DIR: ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR "In-source builds not allowed. Use the Makefile wrapper (e.g. make), or create a new build directory and call cmake manually from there (e.g. mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake ..)")
endif()

#We install to the source directory by default
if (CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX_INITIALIZED_TO_DEFAULT)
    set (CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}" CACHE PATH "default install path" FORCE)
endif()

set(OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD "auto" CACHE STRING "Should OpenFPGA be compiled with interprocedural compiler optimizations?")
set_property(CACHE OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD PROPERTY STRINGS auto on off)

# Disable IPO on Windows MSYS2 to avoid linker errors with complex STL templates
# LTO causes "two or more sections for .gnu.lto__ZNSt..." errors on MinGW64
if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
    message(STATUS "Disabling IPO on MSYS2 environment to avoid LTO linker conflicts")
    set(OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD "off" CACHE STRING "Should OpenFPGA be compiled with interprocedural compiler optimizations?" FORCE)
endif()

# Synchronize IPO settings to submodules
set(VTR_IPO_BUILD ${OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD} CACHE STRING "Should verilog-to-routing be compiled with interprocedural compiler optimizations?" FORCE)

#Allow the user to configure how much assertion checking should occur
set(VTR_ASSERT_LEVEL "2" CACHE STRING "VTR assertion checking level. 0: no assertions, 1: fast assertions, 2: regular assertions, 3: additional assertions with noticable run-time overhead, 4: all assertions")
set_property(CACHE VTR_ASSERT_LEVEL PROPERTY STRINGS 0 1 2 3 4)

#Create the project 
project("OpenFPGA-tool-suites" C CXX)

# Windows fixes
if (MSVC)
    add_compile_definitions(
        NOMINMAX
        _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS
    )
else()
    add_compile_definitions(NOMINMAX)
endif()


# Version number
file (STRINGS "VERSION.md" VERSION_NUMBER)
string (REPLACE "." ";" VERSION_LIST ${VERSION_NUMBER})
list(GET VERSION_LIST 0 OPENFPGA_VERSION_MAJOR)
list(GET VERSION_LIST 1 OPENFPGA_VERSION_MINOR)
list(GET VERSION_LIST 2 OPENFPGA_VERSION_PATCH)
set(OPENFPGA_VERSION_PRERELEASE "dev")


# Set the assertion level
add_definitions("-DVTR_ASSERT_LEVEL=${VTR_ASSERT_LEVEL}")

# compiler flag configuration checks
include(CheckCXXCompilerFlag)

# Options
## General options
option(OPENFPGA_WITH_YOSYS "Enable building Yosys" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_WITH_SLANG "Enable building Yosys Slang plugin" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_WITH_TEST "Enable testing build for codebase. Once enabled, make test can be run" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_WITH_VERSION "Enable version always-up-to-date when building codebase. Disable only when you do not care an accurate version number" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_WITH_SWIG "Enable SWIG interface when building codebase. Disable when you do not need high-level interfaces, such as Tcl/Python" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_ENABLE_STRICT_COMPILE "Specifies whether compiler warnings should be treated as errors (e.g. -Werror)" OFF)
option(OPENFPGA_UPDATE_UNIQUE_BLOCK_CAPN "Specifies whether to update capn'proto files required by unique block. Recommend only after any modification on  unique block parsers and data structures" OFF)
## Installer options
option(OPENFPGA_GUI_INSTALLER "Enable installer with a graphical user interface" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER "Enable installer to be built" ON)
option(OPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC "Installer will include documentation" ON)
message(STATUS "CMAKE_OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER: ${OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER}")
message(STATUS "CMAKE_OPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC: ${OPENFPGA_INSTALL_DOC}")
# Readline options
set(OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES "libreadline" "libedit" "standard")
set(OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE "libreadline" CACHE STRING "Select the type of readline function to use in shell interface")
# Attach the STRINGS property so GUI/TUI tools display a dropdown
set_property(CACHE OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE PROPERTY STRINGS ${OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES})
# Enforce validation on configure
if (NOT OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE IN_LIST OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "Invalid value for OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE. Allowed values are: ${OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODES}")
endif()
message(STATUS "Readline feature mode: ${OPENFPGA_READLINE_MODE}")

# Options pass on to VTR

set(WITH_ABC ON CACHE BOOL "Enable building ABC in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(WITH_ODIN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building Odin in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(ODIN_DEBUG OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with debug flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(ODIN_WARN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with extra warning flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(ODIN_COVERAGE OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with coverage flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(ODIN_TIDY OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with clang tidy in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(ODIN_SANITIZE OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with sanitize flags in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(WITH_YOSYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building Yosys in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(WITH_PARMYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Yosys as elaborator and parmys-plugin as partial mapper")
set(ODIN_YOSYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building odin with yosys in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(YOSYS_SV_UHDM_PLUGIN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building and installing Yosys SystemVerilog and UHDM plugins in Verilog-to-Routing")
set(YOSYS_F4PGA_PLUGINS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable building and installing Yosys SystemVerilog and UHDM plugins")
set(VTR_ENABLE_VERSION ${OPENFPGA_WITH_VERSION} CACHE BOOL "Enable version always-up-to-date when building codebase. Disable only when you do not care an accurate version number")
set(WITH_PARMYS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Yosys as elaborator and parmys-plugin as partial mapper")
set(VPR_ENABLE_INTERCHANGE ON CACHE BOOL "Enable FPGA interchange")
# TODO: OpenFPGA and VPR has different requirements on no-warning build, e.g., on OS and compiler versions
#set(VTR_ENABLE_STRICT_COMPILE ${OPENFPGA_ENABLE_STRICT_COMPILE} CACHE BOOL "Specifies whether compiler warnings should be treated as errors (e.g. -Werror)")

# Override WGET Options
if (WIN32)
  if(MSVC)
    set(WGET_OUTPUT_OPTION "-o" CACHE STRING "Wget output option" FORCE)
  elseif(DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
    message(STATUS "Wget specifically using the Msys2 toolchain")
    set(WGET_OUTPUT_OPTION "-O" CACHE STRING "Wget output option" FORCE)
  endif()
elseif(UNIX AND NOT APPLE)
  set(WGET_OUTPUT_OPTION "-O" CACHE STRING "Wget output option" FORCE)
endif()

# TCL file/lib required to link with SWIG generated wrapper
if (OPENFPGA_WITH_SWIG)
#Find Tcl
  find_package(TCL REQUIRED)
  if(NOT TCL_FOUND)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "TCL not found. Please install TCL development headers (e.g. tcl8.6-dev).")
  endif()
  message(STATUS "TCL_INCLUDE_PATH: ${TCL_INCLUDE_PATH}")
  message(STATUS "TCL_LIBRARY: ${TCL_LIBRARY}")

#Find SWIG
  find_package(SWIG 3.0 REQUIRED)
  if (SWIG_VERSION VERSION_GREATER_EQUAL "4.1.0")
    message(WARNING "Using SWIG >= ${SWIG_VERSION} -flatstaticmethod flag for python")
  endif()
  include(UseSWIG)
endif()

#Compiler flag configuration checks
include(CheckCXXCompilerFlag)

#
# We require c++20 support
#
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF) #No compiler specific extensions

#
# Interprocedural optimization
#
#   Note that we manually clear the INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION flag on ABC later
#   to avoid cmake warnings
include(CheckIPOSupported)
check_ipo_supported(RESULT IPO_SUPPORTED)
if (OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD STREQUAL "on")
    if (IPO_SUPPORTED)
        message(STATUS "Building with IPO: on")
        set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION ON)
    else()
        message(ERROR "Building with IPO unsupported with this compiler!")
    endif()
elseif(OPENFPGA_IPO_BUILD STREQUAL "auto")
    if (IPO_SUPPORTED AND NOT CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "debug")
        message(STATUS "Building with IPO: on (auto)")
        set(CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION ON)
    else()
        message(STATUS "Building with IPO: off (auto)")
    endif()
else()
    message(STATUS "Building with IPO: off")
endif()

if(NOT MSVC)
    # for GCC and Clang
    set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG} -O0 -g3")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG} -O0 -g3")
endif()

# Set WARN FLAGS
set(WARN_FLAGS "")

if (MSVC)
  # Visual studio warnings 
  # Note that we do not use /Wall since it generates warnings about standard library headers
  set(WARN_FLAGS_TO_CHECK # the flags to check if the compiler supports
      "/W4" # Most warnings
     )
else ()
  set(WARN_FLAGS_TO_CHECK # the flags to check if the compiler supports
      #GCC-like
      "-Wall"                         #Most warnings, typically good
      "-Wextra"                       #Extra warning, usually good
      "-Wpedantic"                    #Ensure ISO compliance (i.e. no non-standard extensions)
      "-Wcast-qual"                   #Warn if cast removes qualifier (e.g. const char* -> char*)
      "-Wcast-align"                  #Warn if a cast causes memory alignment changes
      "-Wshadow"                      #Warn if local variable shadows another variable
      "-Wformat=2"                    #Sanity checks for printf-like formatting
      "-Wno-format-nonliteral"        # But don't worry about non-literal formtting (i.e. run-time printf format strings)
      "-Wlogical-op"                  #Checks for logical op when bit-wise expected
      "-Wmissing-declarations"        #Warn if a global function is defined with no declaration
      "-Wmissing-include-dirs"        #Warn if a user include directory is missing
      "-Wredundant-decls"             #Warn if there are overlapping declarations
      "-Wswitch-default"              #Warn if a switch has no default
      "-Wundef"                       #Warn if #if() preprocessor refers to an undefined directive
      "-Wunused"                      #Warn about unused variables/parameters
      "-Wunused-variable"             #Warn about variables that are not used
      "-Wunused-parameter"            #Warn about function parameters which are unused
      "-Wdisabled-optimization"       #Warn when optimizations are skipped (usually due to large/complex code)
      "-Wnoexcept"                    #Warn when functions should be noexcept (i.e. compiler know it doesn't throw)
      "-Woverloaded-virtual"          #Warn when a function declaration overrides a virtual method
      "-Wctor-dtor-privacy"           #Warn about inaccessible constructors/destructors
      "-Wnon-virtual-dtor"            #Warn about missing virtual destructors
      "-Wduplicated-cond"             #Warn about identical conditions in if-else chains
      "-Wduplicated-branches"         #Warn when different branches of an if-else chain are equivalent
      "-Wnull-dereference"            #Warn about null pointer dereference execution paths
      "-Wuninitialized"               #Warn about unitialized values
      "-Winit-self"                   #Warn about self-initialization
      "-Wcatch-value=3"               #Warn when catch statements don't catch by reference
      "-Wextra-semi"                  #Warn about redudnant semicolons
      "-Wimplicit-fallthrough=3"      #Warn about case fallthroughs, but allow 'fallthrough' comments to suppress warnings
      #GCC-like optional
      #"-Wsuggest-final-types"         #Suggest where 'final' would help if specified on a type methods
      #"-Wsuggest-final-methods"       #Suggest where 'final' would help if specified on methods
      #"-Wsuggest-override"            #Suggest where 'override' should be specified
      #"-Wold-style-cast"              #Warn about using c-style casts
      #"-Wconversion"                  #Warn when type conversions may change value
      #"-Wsign-conversion"             #Warn if a conversion may change the sign
      #"-Wpadded"                      #Will warn if additional padding is introduced to a struct/class. Turn on if optimizing class memory layouts
      #"-Wstrict-overflow=2"           #Warn if the compiler optimizes assuming signed overflow does not occur
      #"-Wfloat-equal"                 #Warn about using direct floating point equality
      #"-Wunsafe-loop-optimizations"   #Warn when loops can't be optimized
      #"-Wswitch-enum"                 #Warn about uncovered enumeration values in a switch (even if there is a default)
      #"-Wsign-promo"                  #Warn when overload resolution converts an unsigned type to signed when an unsigned overload exists
      #"-Wdouble-promotion"            #Warn when float is implicitly propted to double
      #"-Wuseless-cast"                #Warn about casts to the same type
      #"-Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant" #Warn about using '0' instead of nullptr
      )
endif()

# check and see if the compiler supports the various warning flags
# and add valid flags
foreach (flag ${WARN_FLAGS_TO_CHECK})
  CHECK_CXX_COMPILER_FLAG(${flag} CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
  if (CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
    # flag supported, so enable it
    set (WARN_FLAGS "${WARN_FLAGS} ${flag}")
  endif()
endforeach()

#Suppress IPO link warnings
set(IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS " ")
set(IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS_TO_CHECK
    "-Wno-null-dereference"
    )
foreach(flag ${IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS_TO_CHECK})
    CHECK_CXX_COMPILER_FLAG(${flag} CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
    if(CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_${flag})
        #Flag supported, so enable it
        set(IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS "${IPO_LINK_WARN_SUPRESS_FLAGS} ${flag}")
    endif()
endforeach()

#
# Sanitizer flags
#
set(SANITIZE_FLAGS "")
if(OPENFPGA_ENABLE_SANITIZE)
    #Enable sanitizers
    # -fuse-ld=gold force the gold linker to be used (required for sanitizers, but not enabled by default on some systems)
    set(SANITIZE_FLAGS "-g -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=leak -fsanitize=undefined -fuse-ld=gold")
    message(STATUS "SANTIIZE_FLAGS: ${SANITIZE_FLAGS}")
    link_libraries("-static-libasan") #Fixes 'ASan runtime does not come first in initial library list'
endif()

# Extra flags
set(SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS "")
if (OPENFPGA_WITH_SWIG)
    set(SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS "-fpic")
endif()
add_compile_options(${SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS})

# Set final flags
#
separate_arguments(
    ADDITIONAL_FLAGS UNIX_COMMAND "${SANITIZE_FLAGS} ${PROFILING_FLAGS} ${COVERAGE_FLAGS} ${LOGGING_FLAGS} ${COLORED_COMPILE} ${EXTRA_FLAGS} ${SWIG_SHARED_FLAGS}"
    )
separate_arguments(
    WARN_FLAGS UNIX_COMMAND "${WARN_FLAGS}"
    )

# 
# Sub-projects with their own compiler settings
#
add_subdirectory(vtr-verilog-to-routing)

add_compile_options(${WARN_FLAGS}) #Add warn flags for VTR tools
add_compile_options(${ADDITIONAL_FLAGS})
link_libraries(${ADDITIONAL_FLAGS})

# Unit Testing
#
if (OPENFPGA_WITH_TEST)
    enable_testing()
endif()

# 
# Sub-projects to apply current complier settings
#
add_subdirectory(libs)
add_subdirectory(openfpga)

# yosys compilation starts

# Compilation options for yosys
include(CMakeParseArguments)

##project(yosys)

# Options to enable/disable dependencies
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_TCL, "Enable TCL parser integrated in yosys" ON)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_ABC, "Enable ABC library integrated in yosys" ON)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_PLUGINS, "Enable plug-in in yosys" ON)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_READLINE, "Enable readline library in yosys" ON)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_VERIFIC, "Enable verification library in yosys" OFF)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_COVER, "Enable coverage test in yosys" ON)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_LIBYOSYS, "Enable static library compiled yosys" OFF)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_GPROF, "Enable profiling in compiled yosys" OFF)
option(YOSYS_ENABLE_NDEBUG, "Enable non-debugging feature in compiled yosys" OFF)

#
## Search and link dependent packages
## We need readline to compile 
if (YOSYS_ENABLE_READLINE)
  find_package(Readline REQUIRED)
endif()

#PugiXml has some deliberate switch fallthrough cases (as indicated by comments), but they
#are tagged as warnings with g++-7 (the comments don't match g++-7's suppression regexes).
#Since we don't want to change PugiXml (it is developed externally), we relax the warning
#level so no fallthrough warnings are generated
CHECK_CXX_COMPILER_FLAG("-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0" CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0)
if(CXX_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0)
    target_compile_options(libpugixml PRIVATE "-Wimplicit-fallthrough=0")
endif()

# Only patch abc makefile on Msys2 where linker complains
# Find the Python 3 interpreter
find_package(Python3 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Interpreter)
if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
    set(PY_PATCH_ABC_MAKEFILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/dev/patch_abc_makefile.py")
    set(ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/yosys/abc")
    set(ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH "Makefile")
    set(ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH "Makefile.patched")
    message(STATUS "Patching ${ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR}/${ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH}")
    add_custom_command(
        OUTPUT ${ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH}
        COMMAND "${Python3_EXECUTABLE}" "${PY_PATCH_ABC_MAKEFILE}" "${ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH}"
        COMMAND ${CMAKE_COMMAND} -E touch ${ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH}
        COMMENT "Apply sed patch to ${ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR}/${ABC_MAKEFILE_FPATH} for long linker command fix"
        DEPENDS "${PY_PATCH_ABC_MAKEFILE}"
        VERBATIM
        WORKING_DIRECTORY "${ABC_MAKEFILE_DIR}"
    )
    add_custom_target(patch_abc_makefile ALL DEPENDS ${ABC_MAKEFILE_PATCH_FPATH})
endif()

# Once Yosys adapts to CMake. This will be much simplified
# Yosys build options
set(YOSYS_CONFIG_OPTION "config-gcc" CACHE STRING "Yosys configuration on environment") 
set(YOSYS_BUILD_OPTION "ENABLE_CCACHE=1" CACHE STRING "Yosys build options") 
set(SLANG_BUILD_CONFIG "" CACHE STRING "Slang build configuration on environment") 
set(SLANG_CMAKE_CONFIG "" CACHE STRING "Slang cmake configuration on environment") 
if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
    message(STATUS "Build Yosys in an MSYS2 MinGW-w64 environment")
    set(YOSYS_CONFIG_OPTION "config-msys2-64" CACHE STRING "Yosys configuration on environment" FORCE) 
    set(YOSYS_BUILD_OPTION "DISABLE_ABC_THREADS=1 ENABLE_CCACHE=1" CACHE STRING "Yosys build options on environment" FORCE) 
    set(SLANG_BUILD_CONFIG "-Wl,--exclude-all-symbols" CACHE STRING "Slang build configuration on environment" FORCE) 
    set(SLANG_CMAKE_CONFIG "" CACHE STRING "Slang cmake configuration on environment") 
endif() 

# we will check if yosys already exist. if not then build it
if (OPENFPGA_WITH_YOSYS STREQUAL "ON")
    if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/bin/yosys)
        message(STATUS "Yosys pre-build exist so skipping it")
    else ()
        # run makefile provided, we pass-on the options to the local make file 
        add_custom_target(
            yosys ALL
            # add step to remove the 'built-in' quicklogic plugins code in yosys
            COMMAND $(MAKE) ${YOSYS_CONFIG_OPTION}
            COMMAND $(MAKE) install PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/ ${YOSYS_BUILD_OPTION}
            WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/yosys
            COMMENT "Compile Yosys with given Makefile"
        )
        # Add dependency on patched Makefile if on MinGW
        if (DEFINED ENV{MSYSTEM})
          add_dependencies(yosys patch_abc_makefile)
        endif()  
        # yosys compilation ends
        # yosys-plugins compilation starts
        if (OPENFPGA_WITH_SLANG)
          add_custom_target(
              yosys-slang ALL
              COMMAND $(MAKE) install YOSYS_PREFIX=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/bin/ CMAKE_FLAGS+="-DPASS_NAME=read_slang ${SLANG_CMAKE_CONFIG}" LDFLAGS+="${SLANG_BUILD_CONFIG}"
              WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/yosys-slang
              DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/yosys/bin/yosys
              COMMENT "Compile Yosys-Slang with given Makefile"
          )
          add_dependencies(yosys-slang yosys)
        endif()
    endif()
endif()

# For installer
if (OPENFPGA_WITH_INSTALLER)
  include(OpenfpgaInstaller)
  include(OpenfpgaPackaging)
endif()

file.content:
FROM ghcr.io/lnis-uofu/openfpga-master:8d555772

# Install node js
USER root
RUN curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_18.x | bash -
RUN curl -fsSL https://code-server.dev/install.sh | sh
RUN apt-get install -y nodejs
RUN apt-get install tree

# = = = = = = = VSCODE Extension installation = = = = = = =
# Python support in vscode
RUN code-server --install-extension ms-python.python
# For CSV file alignment
RUN code-server --install-extension mechatroner.rainbow-csv
# For VCD Viewer
RUN wget -O _wavetrace.gz https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/_apis/public/gallery/publishers/wavetrace/vsextensions/wavetrace/1.1.2/vspackage
RUN code-server --install-extension wavetrace.wavetrace
# For XML Linting
RUN code-server --install-extension dotjoshjohnson.xml
# For git graphs
RUN code-server --install-extension mhutchie.git-graph
# verilog-linter
RUN code-server --install-extension mshr-h.veriloghdl
# = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = = =

RUN usermod -u 2000 openfpga_user
RUN groupmod -g 2000 openfpga_user

ARG NB_USER=user_openfpga
ARG NB_UID=1000
ENV USER ${NB_USER}
ENV NB_UID ${NB_UID}
ENV HOME /home/${NB_USER}

RUN adduser --disabled-password \
    --gecos "Default user" \
    --uid ${NB_UID} \
    ${NB_USER}

RUN chown -R ${NB_UID} ${HOME}
RUN chown -R ${NB_UID} /opt/openfpga

WORKDIR ${HOME}
USER ${NB_USER}

ENV PATH $PATH:/home/${NB_USER}/.local/bin

RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install --user --no-cache-dir notebook
RUN python3 -m pip install --user --no-cache-dir jupyterlab
RUN python3 -m pip install --user --no-cache-dir jupyterhub
RUN python3 -m pip install --user --no-cache-dir jupyter-server
RUN python3 -m pip install --user --no-cache-dir jupyter-server-proxy
RUN python3 -m pip install --user --no-cache-dir jupyter-vscode-proxy

RUN npm install @jupyterlab/server-proxy
RUN jupyter serverextension enable --py jupyter_server_proxy
RUN jupyter lab build
WORKDIR /opt/openfpga/
RUN git reset --hard HEAD

# Set up terminal
RUN echo 'export PS1="\[$(tput bold)\]\[\033[38;5;220m\]\u\[$(tput sgr0)\]:\[$(tput sgr0)\]\[$(tput bold)\]\[\033[38;5;14m\]\W\[$(tput sgr0)\]\\$\[$(tput sgr0) \]"' >> ~/.bashrc
RUN echo 'alias codeopen="code-server -r "' >> ~/.bashrc
RUN mkdir -p .vscode && echo '{"files.associations": {"*.openfpga": "shellscript"},"workbench.colorTheme": "Monokai"}' > .vscode/settings.json
